ddls:
CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Premier League, La Liga) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., top-tier, second-tier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the leagues table */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the positions table */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing team A */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing team B */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the leagues table */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A win, draw, Team B win) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the matches table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card, substitution) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, fracture) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, serious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the team the player transferred to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transfer fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the matches table */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the leagues table */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the metrics apply */,
  "ova" REAL /* Overall Ability (OVA) */,
  "bov" REAL /* Base Overall Value (BOV) */,
  "pot" REAL /* Potential (POT) */,
  "growth" REAL /* Growth indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Overall value across metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "attacking" REAL /* Attacking skill rating */,
  "crossing" REAL /* Crossing skill rating */,
  "finishing" REAL /* Finishing skill rating */,
  "dribbling" REAL /* Dribbling skill rating */,
  "curve" REAL /* Curve skill rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_attributes" (
  "physical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical attribute entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength rating */,
  "stamina" REAL /* Stamina rating */,
  "jumping" REAL /* Jumping ability rating */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance rating */,
  "power" REAL /* Power rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_attributes" (
  "mental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental attribute entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "mentality" REAL /* Mentality rating */,
  "vision" REAL /* Vision rating */,
  "positioning" REAL /* Positioning rating */,
  "composure" REAL /* Composure rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goalkeeping_attributes" (
  "goalkeeping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goalkeeping attribute entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "gk_diving" REAL /* GK Diving ability rating */,
  "gk_handling" REAL /* GK Handling ability rating */,
  "gk_kicking" REAL /* GK Kicking ability rating */,
  "gk_positioning" REAL /* GK Positioning ability rating */,
  "gk_reflexes" REAL /* GK Reflexes rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goalkeeping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in hours */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the training (e.g., skills, tactics) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the coaches table */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., skills, tactics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the matches table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists provided by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis log */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the player's performance */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on analysis (e.g., recommend training focus) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the coaches table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
